reference: NOT TO KNOW WHEN YOU WOULD COME HOME I CAN ASSURE YOU NOR FOR ANY OTHER OCCASION OF MY OWN BUT WITH A COUSIN OF MINE THAT HAD LONG DESIGNED TO MAKE HERSELF SPORT WITH HIM AND DID NOT MISS OF HER AIM
text: Not to know when you would come home, I can assure you, nor for any other occasion of my own, but with a cousin of mine that had long designed to make herself sport with him, and did not miss of her aim.
